description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

render_findings_list (lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex:571-595) emits a flat <ul> with no grouping. On a busy PR (5+ findings of mixed kinds) the reviewer has to mentally bin codes themselves.

Group by leg of the triangle (Spec well-formed / Spec↔Code / Spec↔Tests / Code↔Tests / Coverage / Decisions / Branch), then by severity within each group. Show counts per group as the heading. Reuse the existing tooltip(:severity, sev) mechanism to give each finding code a one-line "what does this mean" hover.

Depends on the triangle-code classifier (child #1) so groups can be derived from the same code-to-leg mapping rather than duplicated.

Reasoning:
- Leg-mapping non-duplication is enforced by test "code_to_leg_lookup is sourced from build_sync_checks (no duplication)" (test/specled_ex/review/html_test.exs:286-310): walks every code in build_sync_checks and asserts presence in the lookup with a known bucket. Drift is mechanically detectable.
- Tooltip reuse is pinned by "each finding still uses the tooltip(:severity, sev) mechanism" (asserts literal "Error — blocks the gate" text from tooltip(:severity, "error")) and by the heading-chip tooltip test.
- Group ordering is pinned by byte-offset sort assertion in "groups appear in the canonical leg order" — would fail under any reordering.
- Severity ordering within group is pinned by byte-offset comparison of distinct message strings.
- Mechanical scope is clean: only lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex (declared in spec_review.surface) and test/specled_ex/review/html_test.exs (declared in spec_review.surface) touched. No new deps, no refactor of adjacent legs, no other render_* helpers altered.
- Out-of-Scope intent: no behavior change to render_sync_diagram, render_sync_checklist, or build_sync_checks themselves; the only API delta is render_findings_list/1 going from defp to def for testability, which is necessary scope.

Per orchestration overrides: not merging back, not cleaning up worktree, not closing ticket.
MERGED into specled_-qm1/spec-review-html. Closing per orchestrator.

title: Group global findings list by leg + severity
